Name: Ameliorate
Description:
Range: **1**$^a$
Target: One Ally or Self
Effect: Choose 1: Reduce the target's **Fatigue** by 1,
reduce the target's **Stress** by 1, or
reduce the stacks of a Status by 2
Overexert: Choose 2 instead, or choose the same one twice
Upgrade a: Increase the Range by half your REA
Upgrade b:
When you use this ability (in either its normal or Overexert modes)
you may choose an additional option not already selected

Name: Spirit Armor
Description:
Range: 2
Target: One Ally or Self
Effect: The target may add your Animism Training level to a Defense roll,
reducing any **Fatigue** or **Stress** taken by 1. Alternatively if they
fail a Panic or Incapacity Roll they may reroll. Either way, end this Buff
after it is used unless you take **Stress** to maintain it
Upgrade a: The bonus granted to the roll increases by half your FOC
Upgrade b: The target may add your Animism Training to their reroll

Name: Command Aggressor
Description:
Range: 4
Effect: Position a Minion. You may have your minion make a Physical Attack
against an enemy adjacent to it (resolve using your Animism)
Effect: Push the target **1**$^b$ spaces  
Success: Deal **2 Fatigue**
Critical: Deal an additional **1**$^a$ **Fatigue**
Upgrade a: Increase the additional Fatigue on a Critical by half your POW
Upgrade b: Increase the distance pushed by half your REA

Name: Command Protector
Description:
Range: 2
Effect: When you take or renew this stance, Position a Minion  
Trigger: An enemy exits a space adjacent to your minion for the first time on their turn.  
Effect: You may make a Physical Attack against the triggering enemy.
If you do, end this stance.  
Success: Deal **1**$^a$ **Fatigue**
Upgrade a: Increase the Fatigue on a success by half your POW
Upgrade b: On a Critical, apply **Slowed** equal to half your FIN

Name: Bolster
Description:
Range: 2
Effect: When you take or renew this stance, Position a Minion.  
Effect: The minion has **Aura** **1**$^a$. You and your allies have
+**1**$^b$ to all defensive rolls while in the aura.
Upgrade a: Increase the size of the Aura by half your REA
Upgrade b: Increase the bonus to defensive rolls by half your FOC

Name: Channel Will
Description:
Effect: When you take the **Basic Attack** or **Resuscitate** actions or
the **Assist** or **Protect** stances, you may use your **Minion**'s space
instead of your own for the purpose of determining whether a target is in Range.
You may also select targets for other abilities you have as if you were
in your Minion's space, but if they have a Range greater than **[1]**,
they are treated as if they had a Range of **[1]** instead (this does not
apply to basic actions and stances).
Upgrade a: Increase the maximum Range of channeled non-Basic abilities by half your REA
Upgrade b: When you use a Basic Ability in this way, you may reduce your **Stress Load** by 1

Name: Soul Bond
Description:
Effect: When your minion would disappear as a result of taking Fatigue or Stress,
you may prevent it from disappearing by taking **Stress**
Upgrade a:
If an ally adjacent to your minion would take **Fatigue** or **Stress**,
you may reduce the amount they take by 1 by taking **Stress**
Upgrade b:
When you would take **Fatigue** or **Stress** while you have a minion in play,
you may reduce the amount you take by 1 by removing your minion from play
